notes: IBM publishes extensive security guidance, whitepapers, and reference documents across many domains. This reference-type entry covers their guidance content. Other IBM SecID entries: advisory/com/ibm (PSIRT advisories), control/com/ibm, disclosure/com/ibm, weakness/com/ibm.

data.description: IBM-published security guidance documents, including whitepapers on emerging topics like Generative AI controls.
